headline: Fortrea, Alignment Healthcare, PacBio, DexCom, and Humana Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after easing crude oil prices helped lift investor sentiment and reduce inflation worries.
